title: Salter Max Digital Bathroom Scale – Supersize LCD Display, 250 kg Capacity, Large Platform, Easy Read, Carpet Feet & Batteries Included, Kg/lbs, Instant Readings, Weight Measurements, White
features: Boasting an impressive 250 kg maximum capacity, this Premium Max Electronic scale from Salter is suitable for the whole family to use.
Featuring a slim sleek design for neat easy storage, simply step on the scale for an instant weigh in without pressing any buttons.
Measuring in kilograms or stones and pounds, this digital scale can be altered with the press of a button to suit your preference.
The supersize LCD display allows all users to easily read their measurements and the toughened glass platform is slim for easy storage.
Included with the scale, the carpet feet attachments secure to the bottom of the scale so that it can be used on uneven floors.
